div.div: No Shade at Pitti - Summer Version
Ode to a Conversation Stuck in Your Throat
Gather 10 000 tons of Fish resource by fishing boats or fish farms in one city.
Gather 2 000 tons of Oil with the offshore oil platforms in one city.
